item.title: America long ago solved its dog problem. But what about the cats?
item.description: Free-roaming felines kill 2 billion birds a year in America. That’s a policy failure.

item.title: $1.77 billion for your thoughts? This war is worth fighting.
item.description: America is letting foreign disinformation run rampant.

item.title: In NYC schools, suspensions are down. Why are assaults rising?
item.description: The city’s public schools prefer restorative justice. But the results don’t add up.

item.title: The FDA opened a gaping loophole for flavored vapes
item.description: Federal regulators are allowing sales of unapproved e-cigarettes and nicotine pouches.

item.title: Monumental debt
item.description: Michael Ramirez cartoon on the national debt and plans to build an arch.

item.title: Harvard’s solution won’t stop runaway A’s. This could.
item.description: Require transcripts to include the average grade for a given class.

item.title: Trump’s Iran exit ramp is a long shot. He doesn’t have a better option.
item.description: The administration's peace framework asks the mullahs to choose prosperity over ideology.
